metadata.title: Required Corrections from ICH E-Series Verification

corrections.issue: PBRER submission deadline of 70 calendar days incorrectly scoped to 6-monthly reports only. JSON assigns 90 days to annual PBRERs.
corrections.correct_value: 70 days for both 6-month AND 12-month intervals; 90 days only for intervals exceeding 12 months
corrections.pdf_quote: PBRERs covering intervals of 6 or 12 months: within 70 calendar days. PBRERs covering intervals in excess of 12 months: within 90 calendar days.
corrections.impact: Could cause missed compliance deadlines for annual PBRERs if 90 days is used instead of the required 70 days.
corrections.action: UPDATE: Change annual PBRER deadline from 90 to 70 calendar days. Restrict 90-day deadline to >12-month intervals only.

corrections.source: ICH E2A, Sections II.B and III.A.2
corrections.issue: 'Important medical event' listed as 6th SAE criterion at same level as the 5 formal criteria. E2A structures it separately in Section III.A.2.
corrections.current_value: 6-item criteria list with 'important medical event' as criterion 6
corrections.correct_value: 5 formal criteria (death, life-threatening, hospitalisation, disability, congenital anomaly) + separate note that 'important medical events may jeopardise the patient or require intervention to prevent one of the above outcomes' per Section III.A.2
corrections.pdf_quote: E2A Section III.A.2: 'Medical and scientific judgement should be exercised in deciding whether expedited reporting is appropriate in other situations, such as important medical events that may not be immediately life-threatening...'
corrections.impact: Conflation could lead to overclassification of events as SAEs or confusion in regulatory training about the formal SAE definition structure.
corrections.action: RESTRUCTURE: Move 'important medical event' from criteria array to a separate note field. Clarify it is a supplementary regulatory reporting consideration, not a 6th formal criterion.

corrections.issue: Uses 'Reporting Period' where E2C(R2) consistently uses 'Reporting Interval'. This is a deliberate terminology choice in the guideline.
corrections.current_value: Summaries of Significant Findings from Clinical Trials during the Reporting Period
corrections.correct_value: Summaries of Significant Findings from Clinical Trials during the Reporting Interval
corrections.action: UPDATE: Replace 'Reporting Period' with 'Reporting Interval' throughout PBRER section titles and descriptions. Search for all instances of 'Reporting Period' in E2C(R2)-sourced content.

corrections.issue: Conflates baseline data (Section 2.3) into the mandatory safety data collection list (Section 2.4), presenting 7 items as a single list when the PDF has them in separate sections.
corrections.correct_value: 6-item mandatory safety collection list from Section 2.4 + separate baseline data requirements from Section 2.3
corrections.action: RESTRUCTURE: Split into two fields -- 'mandatory_safety_data' (6 items from Section 2.4) and 'baseline_data_requirements' (from Section 2.3).

corrections.issue: Section citation error: cites Section III, 3.3 (Allocation of Activities) but content is from Section 3.11.4 (Monitoring).
corrections.action: UPDATE: Change section reference from '3.3' to '3.11.4' (specifically 3.11.4.2 for centralised monitoring).

corrections.issue: Rule adds 'ADME characteristics' and 'receptor sensitivity' to the intrinsic factors list. These are discussed in the body text but not enumerated in Appendix A's factor table.
corrections.current_value: List includes 'ADME characteristics' and 'receptor sensitivity' attributed to Appendix A
corrections.correct_value: Appendix A lists: genetic polymorphism, age, gender, height, weight, lean body mass, body composition, organ dysfunction. ADME/receptor sensitivity are body text concepts.
corrections.action: UPDATE: Either remove the two extra items from the Appendix A-attributed list, or add a note indicating they are derived from body text discussion rather than the Appendix A enumeration.

corrections.issue: Rule appends text from Section 2.8.1 ('in accordance with regulatory requirements and the Declaration of Helsinki') to Principle 4 content, but cites only Principle 4.
corrections.action: UPDATE: Add secondary section reference to 2.8.1, or split the appended clause into a separate note.

corrections.issue: Section citation error: cites Section 2.5 (Age Classification) but content is from Sections 2.4.3 (Safety) and 2.4.4 (Postmarketing).
corrections.action: UPDATE: Change section reference from '2.5' to '2.4.3, 2.4.4'.

corrections.issue: Section citation error: cites Section 2.3 which does not exist. Content is from Section 2.2.5 (Sample Size Planning).
corrections.action: UPDATE: Change section reference from '2.3' to '2.2.5'.

corrections.issue: Omits 'Chemical Abstracts' as an alternative referencing standard and truncates full title of the Vancouver Declaration.
corrections.correct_value: References should follow '1979 Vancouver Declaration on Uniform Requirements for Manuscripts Submitted to Biomedical Journals' OR 'the system used in Chemical Abstracts'
corrections.action: UPDATE: Add the Chemical Abstracts alternative and expand the Vancouver Declaration title.
